title: Marketplace Manager - FabAlley South Asia Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - FabAlley South Asia Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley South Asia Partners:
FabAlley South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
